description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The front yard is landscaped with palm trees, shrubs, and a driveway leading to a covered carport, while the backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a large umbrella. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing for abundant natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The house has two visible stories, with the upper level set back in some areas to create rooftop terraces and open-air spaces. The perimeter is enclosed by a low, dark fence, and the property includes multiple entry points, including a prominent arched glass main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, landscaped yards, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Features include a carport, rooftop terraces, and a prominent arched glass entryway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, umbrella, and a large expanse of lawn, as well as the rear facade's large windows.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house with a mix of light and dark wall finishes, visible interior rooms, and the carport area with parked vehicles.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front facade with the main arched glass entryway, palm trees, driveway, and a red car parked outside.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the house, emphasizing the dark exterior, rooftop terraces, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent arched glass main door with a paved approach, flanked by tall windows and landscaped with palm trees and shrubs.
